name: 炼气
description: 炼气境：引气入体，温养经脉。此「法术」不可主动施放，仅作修为进度的载体——其等级即炼气境的层数（一层至十三层）。
//en_us_description: Qi Refining realm: draw qi into the body and nourish the meridians. This 'spell' is never cast manually; it merely tracks cultivation progress — its level is the stage within the Qi Refining realm (1st to 13th layer).
//: 境界进度容器：用 spell level 表示炼气境的小层。不可施放、无实际效果。等级由吐纳/突破 EOC 推进，灵气上限表达式读取本 spell 的 level。详见 doc/02_cultivation_realms.md 与 doc/03_qi_system.md。
//spell_class: 法术派系即变异：修炼炼气境=拥有「炼气之体」派系特性，该特性携带 qi_max enchantment 抬升灵气上限。引擎在 learn_spell 时会自动授予 spell_class 特性（src/magic.cpp set_mutation），但本 mod 用 set_spell_level 直接设级别（不走 learn_spell、不自动授予），故另由 EOC_immortal_path_bind_realm_trait（监听 character_learns_spell）+ EOC_immortal_path_ensure_realm_trait（RECURRING 兜底旧存档）并行补发。/ Spell class is a mutation: cultivating Qi Refining = having the Qi Cultivator trait, which carries the qi_max enchantment. learn_spell auto-grants the class trait, but this mod sets levels via set_spell_level (no auto-grant), so two EOCs grant it in parallel.
//max_level: 炼气十三层。/ Qi Refining has 13 layers.
//formula: 用线性经验曲线（每层 100 exp），便于吐纳打坐推进；默认指数曲线是为战斗法术调的，太陡。/ Linear exp curve (100 exp/layer) for meditation pacing; the default exponential curve is tuned for combat spells and too steep.
